message:
test(durability): add write_durable unit tests (bd-2h95)

Add 4 tests for the write_durable() helper introduced in 391f1fa:
- creates file with expected content
- overwrites existing file correctly
- empty data creates zero-length file
- fails with clear error on nonexistent parent directory

Durability crate now has 150 tests (up from 146).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
